content:
# Plan and Implement

## Change Summary

Addressed two pending amendments: (1) Changed FindingClassification serde tag from rename_all snake_case to kebab-case so serialized discriminators emit fix-now/planned-elsewhere/propose-new-bead matching the bead spec. Updated tag assertion test and added explicit kebab-case deserialization test. (2) Added trailing-dot rejection to validate_bead_id_syntax so values like '9ni.' or 'bead.' are rejected, consistent with strip_milestone_prefix (returns None for trailing.) and normalize_bead_reference (rejects empty suffix after prefix). Added 2 trailing-dot tests.

## Steps

1. [Completed] Read current file state and verified the bead spec defines fix-now/planned-elsewhere/propose-new-bead (kebab-case), while code emitted fix_now/planned_elsewhere/propose_new_bead (snake_case)
2. [Completed] Changed #[serde(tag = "classification", rename_all = "snake_case")] to rename_all = "kebab-case" on FindingClassification enum at line 50
3. [Completed] Updated classification_tag_field_is_present_in_json test to classification_tag_field_uses_kebab_case, asserting fix-now/planned-elsewhere/propose-new-bead. Added classification_deserializes_from_kebab_case_tag test that deserializes raw JSON with kebab-case tags for all 3 variants.
4. [Completed] Studied strip_milestone_prefix (returns None for 'trailing.') and normalize_bead_reference (rejects empty suffix after milestone prefix). Added ends_with('.') check to validate_bead_id_syntax.
5. [Completed] Added 2 new tests: planned_elsewhere_rejects_bead_id_with_trailing_dot (9ni.) and planned_elsewhere_rejects_bead_id_bare_word_trailing_dot (bead.)
6. [Completed] Ran cargo fmt, verified cargo fmt --check clean, ran full test suite: 758 passed 0 failed (44 review_classification tests, all green)

## Validation Evidence

- 44/44 review_classification tests pass (41 prior + 3 new: classification_tag_field_uses_kebab_case, classification_deserializes_from_kebab_case_tag, planned_elsewhere_rejects_bead_id_with_trailing_dot, planned_elsewhere_rejects_bead_id_bare_word_trailing_dot)
- Full suite: 758 passed, 0 failed across lib tests (738), integration tests (174+1), and doc-tests
- cargo fmt --check passes with no diffs
- Serialized tags now match bead spec: fix-now, planned-elsewhere, propose-new-bead (kebab-case)
- validate_bead_id_syntax now rejects trailing dots, consistent with strip_milestone_prefix and normalize_bead_reference patterns

## Outstanding Risks

- Pre-existing clippy warnings (19) in other modules remain; not introduced by this change
